# Skeleton
A subtle shimmer placeholder for loading content blocks and avatars.
## Import
```tsx
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Skeleton columns={1} showAvatar interval={undefined} offset={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **columns** (number) — default: `1`: Columns
- **showAvatar** (boolean) — default: `true`: Show avatar row
- **interval** (number): Cycle interval (ms)
- **offset** (number): Stack offset
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add skeleton
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/skeleton
```
